title: Ultra Hardcore
description: The most difficult modpack in all of Minecraft. And also the funniest!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ultra_Hardcore/BH_UHC_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ultra-hardcore-renewed) version.** ## This modpack is the hardest you will ever play. It is not a modpack designed to play a 1,000 hour game, it is to play 15, 20, 30 hours, whatever you can last... but keep in mind that at any moment you can die and lose all your progress. There are two main features, the most important, **you will only have one life**, when you die the game will be over. But the most challenging is not that, the one that will really complicate the game is that **you will not be able to regenerate hearts naturally**, only by consuming golden apples, potions or similar. Do you dare to defeat the dragon under these conditions? You won't be able to, or maybe you can? ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ultra_Hardcore/BH_UHC_summary.webp) The explanation for this modpack is simple, and can be summed up in one word, challenge. The goal is to make you have fun playing Minecraft again, living a completely renewed adventure, and suffering for not losing half a heart. This is because the player will only have one life, and also, to complicate the situation even more, he will not be able to recover hearts. Other complementary mods have been added, with the aim of improving the game experience, such as some animals, animations mods or small mods of biomes and structures, but yes, there will not be any mod that radically changes the game, for that there is the theme of the modpack itself. Do you dare? ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ultra_Hardcore/BH_UHC_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 4GB or 4096 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 5GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Ultra_Hardcore/BH_UHC_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aYHS291S/images/a44513cee97b13946fc998b5092626195bb3cab6.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aYHS291S/images/e49ce6d64de50c2d6f48655bf92a596749162a34.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aYHS291S/images/a38faf86e246de2273e20e23561aa54761cd233b.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aYHS291S/images/0e3e5b3eed3be11fad1e06bf2d1ea77590c467c1.jpeg) ![Screenshots 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aYHS291S/images/a5183a690194b1603d7cebae5696f31aff9e64be.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
